use_codes.desc: HUMALOG IS AN INSULIN ANALOG THAT IS INDICATED IN THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH DIABETES MELLITUS FOR THE CONTROL OF HYPERGLYCEMIA
USE FOR THE TREATMENT OF HYPERGLYCEMIA
